purpose: Instructions for creative job detail collection and API-ready export via enrichFromCsv.v2.ts pipeline

phases: Phase 1: Fetch pages (HTTP first, Playwright fallback for JS shells / ATS domains)
Phase 2: Heuristic extraction (JSON-LD + scored HTML description candidates + text patterns)
Phase 3: AI enrichment via Claude Haiku (for incomplete records: short descriptions, missing skills/salary)
Phase 4: Merge heuristic + AI results (prefer better quality description, merge arrays, keep structured fields)
Phase 6: Quality review (heuristic checks + AI review for ambiguous cases)
Phase 7: Output (JSON, CSV, report, pipeline instructions)

fields_to_extract.source: JSON-LD title -> h1 tag -> seed CSV title
fields_to_extract.notes: Filters out careers-page headings (e.g. 'Asana Careers'), strips junk suffixes ('@ Lever', '| LinkedIn'). Flagged for AI fix if title looks generic.

fields_to_extract.source: Final URL after redirects (from Playwright or HTTP fetch)
fields_to_extract.notes: Maps to API jobLink. /apply path suffix stripped. Canonicalized for dedup (UTM params removed).

fields_to_extract.source: Scored HTML selectors (ATS-specific first) -> cleaned text fallback -> JSON-LD description -> meta description
fields_to_extract.notes: Prefers rich HTML from job body containers. Candidate scoring favors responsibilities/qualifications structure and penalizes cookie/login/apply-form content. Apply-form sections (Submit application, Resume/CV, First Name, etc.) are trimmed.
Maps to { placeId, name, formattedAddress, latitude, longitude, city, state, country }. Country codes expanded (US -> United States). 'Remote' as city -> workType=REMOTE, location cleared.

Entity prefixes stripped (ADUS-Adobe Inc. -> Adobe Inc.). URL derivation: careers.X.com -> X, ATS paths (greenhouse.io/company -> company). Company email is backfilled from extracted workEmail when available.

fields_to_extract.source: Keyword inference from title + description + location
JSON-LD baseSalary -> description text pattern matching -> AI extraction
fields_to_extract.notes: Maps to { min, max, currency, period }. Text extraction matches $80,000-$120,000/year and 80k-120k patterns.

fields_to_extract.source: JSON-LD occupationalCategory/industry/qualifications + heuristic keyword terms + AI extraction
fields_to_extract.notes: Tags are represented in API as keywords. Lowercased and deduplicated.

fields_to_extract.source: JSON-LD skills + heuristic skill taxonomy/phrase parsing + AI extraction
fields_to_extract.notes: Normalized to lowercase/underscore canonical ids and deduplicated (e.g., figma, design_systems, ux_research).

fields_to_extract.source: mailto links + email regex over HTML/description
fields_to_extract.notes: Prefers non no-reply addresses. Also copied to company.email when company.email is missing.

fetching_strategy.http_first: Plain HTTP fetch with 2 retries for static pages
fetching_strategy.js_shell_detection: If HTTP returns >2KB HTML but <500 chars visible text, detected as JS shell -> Playwright retry
fetching_strategy.playwright_domains: greenhouse.io, lever.co, smartrecruiters.com, myworkdayjobs.com, icims.com, ashbyhq.com, phenompeople.com, amazon.jobs, workable.com
fetching_strategy.playwright_subdomains: careers.*, career.*, jobs.*, job.*, apply.*, hire.* subdomains always use Playwright
fetching_strategy.playwright_config: networkidle wait + 2000ms extra for JS rendering

ai_enrichment_triggers.missing_salary: Neither JSON-LD nor text pattern found salary

heuristic_checks: Title: blocklist (cookie, login, 404), length bounds, junk suffix stripping, careers-page heading detection
Description: blocklist (cookies banner, login wall), placeholder detection, page chrome stripping, unformatted blob flagging
Company: generic name detection + URL-based fix, entity prefix stripping, joined-word flagging
WorkType: validation + contradiction detection (ONSITE vs 'fully remote' in text)
Location: junk removal, 'Remote' as city -> workType conversion
ai_review_triggers: Generic company names still remaining after heuristic fix
Unformatted blob descriptions (>500 chars, no formatting)

collecting_job_info.deduplication: title (lowercased) + canonicalized job URL as compound key
collecting_job_info.source_metadata: hiringTeam field set to uploader UID (default: system-scraper); allowEmailApplications enabled when workEmail/company.email exists

transformations.notes: Map to object: { name, website, logo, email }
Use unified object { placeId, name, formattedAddress, latitude, longitude, city, state, country }

example_output.title: Senior Product Designer
example_output.description:
Own end-to-end product design across web and mobile experiences.

  • Lead design for core product features
